creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #3)

The author removed all license files from the repository, so the only way to find out the license is his site: https://www.msoos.org/2016/09/cryptominisat-5-0-1-released-with-mit-license/

I've filed a bug requsting him to add one, but i don't want it to block the update. Let's proceed with the current patch?
